value.found_quote: With Codex cloud, Codex can work on tasks in the background (including in parallel) using its own cloud environment.
value.rationale: The page is OpenAI's developer documentation for "Codex web – Delegate to Codex in the cloud," explicitly describing Codex cloud as a feature that lets Codex work on tasks in the background using its own cloud environment. It is presented as currently available (included with Plus, Pro, Business, Edu, or Enterprise plans), substantiating the claim.
